list.name: instance
list.query: SELECT LEFT(instance_hash, 12) || ' (' || profile || ')' AS __text, instance_hash AS __value FROM installations ORDER BY last_seen DESC;

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, cop_instant AS "COP", LEFT(instance_hash, 8) AS "metric" FROM metrics WHERE cop_instant IS NOT NULL AND cop_instant > 0 AND ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, outdoor_temp AS "Outdoor °C", LEFT(instance_hash, 8) AS "metric" FROM metrics WHERE outdoor_temp IS NOT NULL AND ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, compressor_frequency AS "Frequency (Hz)" FROM metrics WHERE compressor_frequency IS NOT NULL AND ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, compressor_current AS "Current (A)" FROM metrics WHERE compressor_current IS NOT NULL AND ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, thermal_power AS "Thermal (kW)" FROM metrics WHERE thermal_power IS NOT NULL AND ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, electrical_power AS "Electrical (kW)" FROM metrics WHERE electrical_power IS NOT NULL AND ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time;

SELECT time, water_inlet_temp AS "Inlet", water_outlet_temp AS "Outlet", dhw_temp AS "DHW" FROM metrics WHERE ($__all = '${instance}' OR instance_hash IN (${instance:sqlstring})) AND $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time;

SELECT i.profile AS "Model", ROUND(AVG(d.cop_avg)::numeric, 2) AS "Avg COP" FROM daily_stats d JOIN installations i ON d.instance_hash = i.instance_hash WHERE d.date > CURRENT_DATE - 30 AND d.cop_avg IS NOT NULL AND d.cop_avg > 0 GROUP BY i.profile ORDER BY "Avg COP" DESC;

SELECT d.date, LEFT(d.instance_hash, 12) AS "Hash", i.profile AS "Model", d.outdoor_temp_avg AS "Outdoor Avg °C", ROUND(d.cop_avg::numeric, 2) AS "COP Avg", d.compressor_starts AS "Starts", ROUND(d.compressor_hours::numeric, 1) AS "Comp. Hours", d.defrost_count AS "Defrosts", ROUND(d.thermal_energy_kwh::numeric, 1) AS "Thermal kWh", ROUND(d.electrical_energy_kwh::numeric, 1) AS "Elec. kWh" FROM daily_stats d LEFT JOIN installations i ON d.instance_hash = i.instance_hash WHERE d.date > CURRENT_DATE - 7 ORDER BY d.date DESC, d.instance_hash;
